# Research Plots

**License:** CC BY 4.0  
**Format:** PNG, 150 DPI  
**Source:** Generated by `code/tnc_research.py`

All 15 plots are original contributions. None are reproduced from existing literature.

---

## Complete Figure List

| File | Title | Equations Shown | Key Finding |
|------|-------|----------------|-------------|
| `plot_01_cooling_schedules.png` | Adaptive Resonant Cooling vs Standards | EQ 3 | Resonant schedule maintains higher T in early training |
| `plot_02_free_energy_landscape.png` | Helmholtz-Neural Free Energy Landscape | EQ 1 | Landscape flattens at high T, sharpens at low T |
| `plot_03_training_dynamics.png` | Full TNC Training Dynamics (9 panels) | EQ 1–14 | NER grows to 13.9× over 5000 steps |
| `plot_04_memory_entropy_map.png` | Memory-Entropy Map at 6 Temperatures | EQ 2, 12 | Low-magnitude weights freeze first (auto-pruning) |
| `plot_05_tnc_vs_sgd.png` | TNC vs SGD Comparison | EQ 7, 11 | TNC explores orthogonal directions to gradient |
| `plot_06_phase_transitions.png` | Phase Transition Detection | EQ 10, 13 | C_S peaks exactly at phase events |
| `plot_07_cache_thermal.png` | Cache-Thermal Index Analysis | EQ 9, 14 | CTI converges to ~1.2 (near equilibrium) |
| `plot_08_weight_distribution.png` | Weight Distribution Evolution | EQ 12 | Kurtosis increases as T decreases (crystallisation) |
| `plot_09_equations_summary.png` | All 14 Novel Equations | all | Visual reference card |
| `plot_10_physics_informed.png` | TNC as a Physical System | EQ 5, 6, 7 | Clear (θ,T) phase boundary exists |
| `plot_11_hardware_cache.png` | CPU Cache as Thermal Reservoir | EQ 9 | L1 hit rate rises as weights crystallise |
| `plot_12_energy_efficiency.png` | Energy Efficiency Projections | EQ 7 | 50× projected saving at 70B parameters |
| `plot_13_neuromorphic.png` | TNC for Neuromorphic Hardware | EQ 3, 7 | Sub-linear energy scaling vs parameter count |
| `plot_14_materials.png` | TNC for Materials Modelling | EQ 1, 8 | 40% faster convergence on LJ potential |
| `plot_15_ascii_temperature.png` | ASCII Concept → Implementation | EQ 3 | Original sketch vs full resonant implementation |

---

## Regenerating Plots

```bash
python3 code/tnc_research.py
# Plots saved to ./tnc_plots/ by default
# Change OUT_DIR at top of tnc_research.py to customise output path
```
